childhood.familyBackground: Born April 29, 1960. Family background in real estate and business.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1960년 4월 29일 출생. 부동산 및 사업 배경의 가족.
childhood.earlyLife: Started in real estate sector. Co-founded Poly Real Estate Group.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 부동산 부문에서 시작. Poly Real Estate Group 공동창립.

careerTimeline.event: Poly Real Estate became second-largest property developer in China
careerTimeline.eventKo: Poly Real Estate가 중국 2번째 규모 부동산 개발사가 됨

careerTimeline.event: Received 4-year sentence for bribery; maintained billionaire status
Controls 200+ million shares in Poly Real Estate Group
careerTimeline.eventKo: Poly Real Estate Group의 2억 주 이상 통제

failures.description: Convicted of bribery and sentenced to 4 years, fined $3.3 million
failures.descriptionKo: 뇌물죄로 유죄 판결, 4년형 선고, 330만 달러 벌금
failures.lesson: Maintain transparent business practices and avoid illegal activities
failures.lessonKo: 투명한 사업 관행 유지 및 불법 활동 회피

personalTraits.knownFor: Co-founding Poly Real Estate Group, major real estate development operations
personalTraits.knownForKo: Poly Real Estate Group 공동창립, 주요 부동산 개발 운영
personalTraits.controversies: Convicted of bribery in 2015, received 4-year prison sentence
